marketing.heading: Your gateway to a world of integrated digital services

marketing.heading: Join us and start your digital journey today
marketing.body: Register now and enjoy thousands of services from verified providers. Your account is your gateway to the digital world.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email or phone to send you a password-reset link.
forgotPassword.label: Email or phone
forgotPassword.successEmail: If the email is registered, we've sent you a password-reset link. It should arrive within a few minutes.
forgotPassword.successPhone: If the phone number is registered, you'll receive reset instructions shortly.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password you don't use on other sites.
resetPassword.invalidTokenBody: The reset link has expired or is invalid. Request a new one from the "Forgot password" page.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your inbox

checkout.title: Confirm your order
checkout.subtitle: Review the service, pick a time and payment method, then confirm.
checkout.notesPlaceholder: Any extra detail that will help the worker — sizes, tools needed, access instructions...
checkout.paymentCashDesc: Pay the worker in cash after the service is done.
checkout.paymentCardDesc: Online card payment. Will be enabled soon.
checkout.confirmFooter: By tapping "Confirm order" we'll forward your details to the worker and notify them immediately. The worker will accept or reject the order from their dashboard.
